content.principles: Multi-Version Concurrency Control. Components: 1. Hidden columns (DB_TRX_ID, DB_ROLL_PTR). 2. Undo Log (stores old versions). 3. Read View (determines version visibility based on active transactions).
content.pitfalls: Undo log growth if transactions stay open. Doesn't solve all phantom read scenarios (requires Gap Locks). Performance hit for very long version chains.
follow_up_paths: Read View creation timing (RC vs RR)
